name: Giant Lizard

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

text:
# Giant Lizard

*Large Beast, Unaligned*

A horse-sized reptile used as mount and pack beast in the Underdark.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.
